techniques.evidence_quote: hackers accessed all of its customers' personal data and a large amount of health claims data
the Medibank ransomware incident in October 2022, which reportedly involved access to the firm's Redshift platform
we have evidence that the criminal has removed some of this data, and it is now likely that the criminal has stolen further personal and health claims data
the ransomware gang made contact to extort the company, providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack

attack_chain.description: Attackers gained initial access to Medibank's environment using compromised credentials, bypassing authentication controls.
Using compromised credentials, attackers accessed Medibank's Amazon Redshift data warehouse platform and queried/accessed all customers' personal data and significant amounts of health claims data.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: poor configurations and lax default settings have led to massive data breaches, like the Medibank ransomware incident in October 2022, which reportedly involved access to the firm's Redshift platform

attack_chain.description: Attackers exfiltrated approximately 200GB of customer personal and health claims data, removing it from Medibank's environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the ransomware gang made contact to extort the company, providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack

attack_chain.description: The ransomware group contacted Medibank to extort the company, leveraging the stolen 200GB of sensitive customer and health data as leverage.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the ransomware gang made contact to extort the company, providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack

initial_access_vector: Compromised credentials used to authenticate to Medibank's environment, reportedly including access to the Amazon Redshift platform
persistence_mechanism: Continued use of compromised valid account credentials to maintain access throughout the dwell period
privilege_escalation: Unknown — not described in source texts
